title: He Prayeth Best Who Loveth Best
content:
"He prayeth best who loveth best
        All things, both great and small;
        For the dear God who loveth us,
        He made and loveth all."
meaning:
"He Prayeth Best Who Loveth Best" is a quintessential example of Louisa May Alcott's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
